channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NASA shares breathtaking images of Artemis II astronauts taking in the view from Orion's windows
item.description: The Artemis II crew is almost at the moon, and the astronauts spent this weekend carrying out preparations for their lunar flyby on Monday. That included manual piloting demonstrations, reviewing their science objectives for the six-hour observation period and evaluating their space suits, which are there for life support in the event of an emergency and for their return home. But, they've had plenty of time to take in the views, too — and those views sure are spectacular. In the latest series of images shared by the space agency, the astronauts are seen gazing at Earth through the windows of ...

item.title: Amazon Is Sticking With ‘Rings of Power’ to the End
item.description: Love it or hate it, it sounds like 'Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power' will be on Prime Video for the long, five-season haul.

item.title: The best dating apps for serious relationships
item.description: The best dating apps for people looking for a long-term relationship.

item.title: Trump Is Reportedly Going Full Steam Ahead with the Golden Dome
item.description: A Bloomberg report provides a rare glimpse into the timeline for Trump's super secret and disputed project.
